svg.text: Tabular time series with station/date/value fields
Parse dates, normalize units, and validate flags
Identify missing days and invalid sentinel values
Request gap filling for missing daily values
Compute day-of-year or monthly baseline from available history
Return filled series with imputation_method flags
Send filled series for optional smoothing
Return processed series plus smoothing flags
Add calendar, day-of-year, and cyclical encodings
Check variance and optional log transform
Build context window and forecast horizon tensors
Store model input with provenance and preprocessing masks
